# License ‚Äî textures-paper

## Upstream

- No upstream asset was copied. All files in this folder were authored locally.

## Acquisition note

- SVG overlays: authored using generic SVG filter primitives (`feTurbulence`, `feColorMatrix`, `feComposite`). These filters are standard SVG spec and are not proprietary.
- PNG overlays: rendered locally via Python Pillow with seeded pseudo-random noise.

## Licensing intent

CC0 ‚Äî public-domain dedication. No restrictions on use, modification, or redistribution, with or without attribution.

## Use in Clawmachine

No restrictions. Ship freely under whatever license Clawmachine adopts.
